gsc_notes: GSC returned 403 — property not yet added to shared account. GSC data not available for this run.
site_audit_source: Manual crawl assessment of mckinnonheating.com.au + competitor content comparison

homepage.notes: Homepage covers the business overview but lacks specific service + suburb signals. No structured schema markup visible. No specific suburb mentions beyond generic 'Melbourne and surrounds'.

service_pages_found.optimisation_gap: No suburb landing pages for ducted heating — biggest revenue driver has no local SEO support
AC installation page likely conflates all AC types — split vs ducted AC vs multi-head not differentiated
Split system page not prominent in current navigation signals
Hydronic is a premium niche with 1,000 monthly searches and KD 22 — needs dedicated, in-depth page
Evaporative page thin relative to 1,300 monthly searches

suburb_pages.notes: No suburb-specific landing pages identified. This is the single biggest gap — all 50 target suburbs have no dedicated content.

blog_content.notes: No blog or resource section identified. Informational content gap across comparison keywords, cost guides, and installation guides.

content_gaps.description: Zero suburb-specific pages exist for any of the 50 target locations. Competitors (Bayair, Dale Air) with suburb pages consistently outrank McKinnon for local queries even with lower DAs on some terms.
content_gaps.action: Create 50 suburb service pages — one per target suburb. Each page targets one primary keyword (e.g. 'ducted heating brighton') with suburb-specific content, proximity signals, and builder partnership mentions where applicable.
content_gaps.expected_impact: high — directly enables top-3 rankings for ~40 location keywords within 6-12 months

content_gaps.description: 1,000 monthly searches, KD 22, no direct HVAC competitor dominating the SERP. Current site likely has thin or generic hydronic content.
content_gaps.action: Build dedicated hydronic heating page: system types (gas boiler, electric heat pump), Bayside/inner-south installation case studies, cost guide for Victorian homes, comparison to ducted.
content_gaps.expected_impact: high — top-5 ranking achievable within 6 months for 'hydronic heating melbourne'

content_gaps.description: Split system installation is a 590/mo Melbourne keyword with KD 25. Competitors have thin pages. McKinnon's full install + supply service is undersold.
content_gaps.action: Expand split system page: wall split, multi-head, brand range (Daikin, Mitsubishi, Fujitsu), supply + install offering, licensing credentials (RTA AU58246).
content_gaps.expected_impact: medium-high — supports both general and location keyword rankings

content_gaps.description: McKinnon is an 'industry leader in gas to electric conversions' per questionnaire but this is not reflected in current SEO content. Growing search category as VIC gas phase-out gains momentum.
content_gaps.action: Create VEU program landing page + gas-to-electric conversion guide. Target 'gas to electric heating melbourne' and related VEU terms.
content_gaps.expected_impact: medium — growing trend keyword; McKinnon has genuine authority here

content_gaps.description: PAA questions across all general keywords reference cost and comparison queries. No cost guides or comparison content exists on the site.
content_gaps.action: Create cost guide pages (ducted heating cost melbourne, split system installation cost melbourne) and comparison content (ducted vs split, gas vs electric).
content_gaps.expected_impact: medium — informational traffic with commercial fallthrough intent

content_gaps.description: McKinnon services the Peninsula but has no Peninsula-specific content. Bayair currently dominates Frankston, Mornington, and Peninsula terms.
content_gaps.action: Create Peninsula hub page + individual suburb pages for Frankston, Mornington, Rosebud, Dromana, Mt Martha, Sorrento, Portsea, Rye, Blairgowrie.
content_gaps.expected_impact: medium — Bayair is beatable on these terms with dedicated content

quick_wins.rationale: McKinnon's physical address is in Moorabbin. Google Business Profile location signal is strongest here. No strong organic competitor. Creating a dedicated Moorabbin page should produce top-3 ranking within 3 months.
KD 22, 1,000/mo volume, no specialist HVAC competitor in top 5. McKinnon has real hydronic expertise. Low competition SERP dominated by product retailers and aggregators.
Suburb literally shares the brand name. No competitor optimises for 'McKinnon' as a location. Brand-location alignment is unique and instant trust signal.
quick_wins.current_position_estimate: may rank from homepage proximity signals

quick_wins.rationale: BDM priority suburb. No heating specialist dominates. SK AIR doesn't cover heating. Create dedicated suburb page and rank within 6 months.
